goal: Implement Claude Design 'Next Deck Chip' — redesign the flat 'X to next deck' chip
done: Implemented the recommended Variation 1 (progress ring) in renderStreakChips (main.js): the days-remaining number sits inside a rose→gold CONIC ring (fill = days-done ÷ milestone) + a 'Day N of M' sub-line (TH 'วันที่ N/M') + subtle glow (reduced-motion safe). Ring = ::before conic-gradient + radial mask on .mt-has-progress .streak-num, driven by --mt-chip-deg per render; dropped the old horizontal .mt-chip-bar for this state. Signed-out/all-unlocked unchanged (dropSub clears it). Verified real browser (forced state): 309° for Day 6/7. Cache-bust 20260623o -> 20260623p; www synced.
fix: next-deck chip = conic progress ring + Day N of M (Claude Design V1).
verified: real-browser forced signed-in chip: conic ring at 309deg, number 1, 'to next deck', 'Day 6 of 7'
filed: Only V1 ring implemented; design also had V2 pips / V3 next-deck-peek / V4 liquid-orb. Ring shows for SIGNED-IN users w/ a next deck.
